name: DischargeGuard Risk Scoring Agent
description: Ingests patient check-in data, cross-references against clinical deterioration patterns, calculates composite readmission risk scores, and maintains the real-time risk dashboard.

skills.name: Risk Assessment
skills.description: Score readmission risk from check-in data. Returns composite risk score (0-100), risk tier (low/medium/high/critical), and escalation flag.
examples: Score risk for patient with heart failure, day 3, weight gain 3lbs, swollen ankles
Assess risk based on: red flags detected - edema, weight gain

skills.name: Risk Dashboard
skills.description: Generate a multi-patient risk dashboard table showing current risk scores and trends.
examples: Show me the current risk dashboard for all monitored patients
